title: Golden Sunflowers
description: a slight improvement of sunflower texture
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56cfff154575d52f5fd0273101bca3a3fabd948a.png) 

## I'll keep it short

This pack **retextures** the sunflower, making it look more **massive** and **golden**!

![screens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/368ffe25c117a283625749970784433b38c381a2.png)

A few screenshots showing how it will look like in the game, as well as a comparison with the other two flowers
